title: Growth Gateway: Investing in critical minerals processing in Africa, South Africa investment case
body: "This presentation and summary was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group to present a robust investment case for South Africa’s critical minerals processing sector, with a focus on high-grade nickel and manganese. The document quantifies the economic opportunity, benchmarks South Africa’s competitive enablers, and outlines a curated pipeline of investment-ready projects.  The document addresses risks around energy security, infrastructure, and technology dependency, while showcasing the country’s industrial base, Special Economic Zones (SEZ) incentives, and renewable energy transition. The report encourages international investment and partnerships to scale South Africa’s midstream capacity and meet global demand for battery-grade materials.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
